entry.title: Re: when consuming cds view its taking more than 30 sec
entry.content:
Hi Thayumanavan,

Good day!!

Please check the Performance Statistics and Analysis Story - Backend Page for runtime(below image for reference).

If you feel still the model is loading slower, then no other way you have to optimize the CDS view as Table functions will obviously reduce the perfomance.

If possible and the requirement do not need live data, please try creating a custom table in S4 and fill the table with background job and fetch the data from there.

Performance Statistics and Analysis Story:

 

Kind regards,

Tha.Ram

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between BOP and AATP?
entry.content: "If you want to publish content that was helped/created by GenAI, you must add the user tag GenAI Assisted Content. For content where it's not possible to add a user tag (e.g., answers), you must include this statement: "GenAI was used to help generate this content." (rules of engagement: https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/rules-of-engagement)

entry.title: SAP SAC Live Data Connection Reduce the Data with the reduction of fields
entry.content:
Hello experts,
I am currently using a live data connection to the SAC. We use a S4Hana system and have the BW connection type. Is there a way to restrict the CDS view in the SAC so that I don't have to import all fields? There is this possibility in the import data connection.

Otherwise, I assume that I have to reduce the amount of data/number of fields in the CDS view, correct?

Best Regards
Niels

entry.title: Re: Generating High Quality Leads with an SAP Business Network Catalog
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Error in Sales order with TM
entry.content:
hi

i config TM status for Sales order and Delivery , and Business logical system has been set but i have fallowing error when i save document

Category ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors ASSERTION_FAILED
ABAP Program /SCMTMS/CL_SD_TM_MAP_TTRQ=====CP
Application Component TM-INT-LI

What happened?
The current application program has detected a situation with the
ASSERT statement that should not occur.
The reason for this runtime error was one of the following:
- For the checkpoint group specified with the ASSERT statement, the
activation mode is "abort".
- A system variant has been used to set the activation mode to "abort"
globally for all checkpoint groups in this system.
- The activation mode is set to "abort" at program level.
- The ASSERT statement is not assigned to any checkpoint groups.

Error analysis
The following checkpoint group was used: No checkpoint group specified

If the FIELDS addition was used in the ASSERT statement, you can find
the content of the first 8 fields specified in the following overview:
(not used)
(not used)
(not used)
(not used)
(not used)
(not used)
(not used)
" (not used) "

entry.title: Re: Outgoing payment approval using Bank payment Advice i...
entry.content: Thank you Prathibha

entry.title: Re: Excel Add-in SSO login issue with script error
entry.content: Hi Madhan, kindly see some solutions which we found during Browser and navigation container issues. You could try the below: how to solve an script error in sso navigation container in excel using chrome To solve a script error in the SSO navigation container in Excel using Chrome, you can try the following steps: 1. Clear browser cache: Go to Chrome settings, click on "Privacy and security," then "Clear browsing data." Select the time range and check the box for "Cached images and files." Click on "Clear data" to clear the cache. 2. Disable browser extensions: Some browser extensions can interfere with the script execution. Disable all extensions temporarily and check if the error persists. If the error is resolved, enable the extensions one by one to identify the problematic one. 3. Update Chrome: Ensure that you are using the latest version of Chrome. Go to Chrome settings, click on "About Chrome," and it will automatically check for updates. If an update is available, install it and restart the browser. 4. Disable hardware acceleration: Sometimes, hardware acceleration can cause script errors. Go to Chrome settings, click on "Advanced," then under the "System" section, disable the toggle for "Use hardware acceleration when available." Restart Chrome and check if the error is resolved. 5. Reset Chrome settings: If none of the above steps work, you can try resetting Chrome settings to their default values. Go to Chrome settings, click on "Advanced," then under the "Reset and clean up" section, click on "Restore settings to their original defaults." Confirm the reset and restart Chrome. If the script error still persists after trying these steps, it may be necessary to contact the support team for the specific SSO navigation container or seek assistance from your IT department. In case of questions let me know. Best regards Didi

entry.title: Unable to get the Insert/Del option in document assignment tab in CS02 after upgrade S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP S/4 HANA 1909, we got the INSERT/DEL option automatically for attaching the document in cs02

 

After the upgrade of SAP S/4 HANA 2023 version, we are unable to get INSERT/DEL option default for attaching the documents in document assignment tab in CS02 (BOM change). 

Path:: CS02>>header>document assignment tab

Could anyone suggest why the system is behaving differently after upgrade?

entry.title: Re: SAC system memory size limit
entry.content: model row limitation is mentioned in this page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/5f61b6509a5e4d499e8cb9685f32db73.html

entry.title: 【SAP Business AI】無料のおすすめ学習コンテンツをまとめました。
entry.content:
皆さん、こんにちは。

SAP Business AIについてキャッチアップをしたいけどなかなか情報が取得できない・・・。
理解したいがどれから始めたらいいかわからない・・・。
という方も多いはず。

こちらの記事では、SAP Business AIに関する認定や無料コース、サンプルプロジェクト、再利用可能なサンプルコードについて知りたい方のために、活用できそうな学習コースをまとめました。特にカスタムAI開発の勉強に活用できるコースを中心にまとめています。

 

なお、全て英語のコンテンツではありますが、ブラウザの翻訳機能を活用すれば日本語で理解することも可能です。数年前に比べてブラウザの翻訳機能もだいぶ精度が向上しましたね。

ぜひAI機能の恩恵を受けつつ、スキルを向上させていきましょう！

SAP TechEd Japan 2024 リプレイ

2025年1月31日(金)までリプレイ配信が予定されています。
SAP TechED Japan 2024のBusiness AIトラック、およびSAPテクノロジートラックの内容は
それぞれ15分~30分でわかりやすくまとまっていますので、とてもおすすめです。

https://gateway.on24.com/wcc/eh/2650067/sap-teched-japan-2024?partnerref=1

 

SAP AI認定

現在、SAPが提供する無料のコースが1つあり、デジタルバッジとして達成記録を取得できます。

Exploring the SAP Business AI Portfolio
SAPのBusiness AI戦略、その原則、倫理、プライバシー基準、およびビジネスに提供する機会について学べます。

AIおよびSAP Business AIに関する無料コース

Learning how to use the SAP AI Core service on SAP Business Technology Platform
SAP AI Coreの機能の活用方法を概要から学べます。

Generative AI at SAP
ビジネスコンテキストでのAIの基本的な使用法と利点を理解するのに役立ちます。
AIの種類と価値を理解し、SAP製品およびソリューションでAI機能をより効果的に活用できるようになります。

Navigating Large Language Models fundamentals and techniques for your use case
Large Language Models（LLMs）の説明と、LLMsに対するSAPのBusiness AI戦略、およびユースケースに最適なLLMパフォーマンスのための技術と方法を提供します。

SAP Discovery Mission 

SAPでは、チュートリアルだけでなく、リファレンスアーキテクチャ、ステップバイステップの勉強内容、リソース、ベストプラクティス、サポートの詳細などを含むSAP Discovery Missionを提供しています。

以下はAI関連のミッションのリストです。長いものも多いですが、全体像が掴めますので、ぜひ年末年始に取り組んでみていただくことをお勧めいたします。

Get Started with SAP Business AI
SAP Business AIのオンボーディング方法をガイドします。

Get Started with SAP Build Code and Joule using Generative AI (Trial and Enterprise Account)
SAP Build Codeのセットアップ方法と、Jouleおよび生成AIを使用して最初のフルスタックアプリを作成する方法をガイドします。

Set Up SAP AI Core Generative AI Hub
SAP AI Core Generative AI Hubのセットアップ方法をガイドします。

Activate Joule for SAP SuccessFactors
SAP SuccessFactorsインスタンスでSAP Jouleをセットアップする方法をガイドします。

Harnessing Generative AI Capabilities with SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine

SAP HANA Cloud、SAP Generative AI Hub、Azure OpenAI、およびLangchain Frameworkの機能を活用する方法をガイドします。

Get Started with Document Information Extraction and Generative AI
生成AIがLLMs（Large Language Models）を使用してビジネス文書処理のユースケースを自動化する方法を学べます。

Digitizing Criticality Assessments using SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad
現在製品化されている実際の顧客ユースケースに基づいた機能を実装するステップがわかります。

Develop a CAP-based (multitenant) application using GenAI and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)
CAPを使用してマルチテナントアプリケーションを構築し、Generative AI HubおよびHANAベクトルエンジンを活用してRAGを実装する方法をガイドします。

リファレンスアーキテクチャ

Retrieval Augmented Generation and Generative AI on SAP BTP
SAP AI CoreのGenerative AI Hubを使用して、さまざまなLarge Language Models（LLMs）をシームレスに組み合わせる方法を説明します。

Federated Machine Learning
SAP Data and Analytics Advisory Methodologyで定義されたユースケースカテゴリ「Predictive Analytics」のユースケースパターン「Federated Machine Learning」に関連しています。

SAP Business AIのサンプルコード

Social Media Citizen Reporting using Generative AI Hub

Embedding business context with the SAP HANA Cloud, Vector Engine

Bringing Open-sourced LLMs into SAP AI Core

Generative AI-based code development with Joule in SAP Build Code

その他Business AI関連情報

SAP AI Community

SAP TechEd Group

SAP Learning Journeys

 

気に入ったら、ぜひ「いいね！」をお願いします！

このブログが皆さんのお役に立てば幸いです。

entry.title: Re: OData Provisioning: A New Capability of SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
@fjaviergar07 : in API Management you are connecting to the backend (SAP Gateway hub) system to consume the OData endpoints (/sap/opu/odata/...) exposed from the backend  system. 

Whereas in OData Provisioning you are connecting to the backend system (ECC/ERP etc) where your OData Service implementation is available and you connect via /sap/iwbep/ node (which is the SAP Gateway backend enablement node).  In this case, OData Provisioning is exposing the OData Endpoints directly on Cloud, with no need to have a SAP Gateway Hub system.

entry.title: Finance F-53 with DMS: "Document XXX/XXXXX/XXX/XX does not exist"
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a enhancement for a custom button in various Tcodes ME*, VA*, VF*, FB*, F-*, etc. which display a popup that create DMS document for the respective document and allows attachments upload.

The enhancement is working fine in almost all cases, except for only one Tcode - F-53 that also in the Posting screen of open items.

Here when user clicks on our button, it will create a new DMS. I have checked this and in debug mode, the document is created using the below BAPI

  CLEAR ls_return.
  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2'
    EXPORTING
      documentdata    = ls_documentdata
    IMPORTING
      documenttype    = lv_documenttype
      documentnumber  = lv_documentnumber
      documentpart    = lv_documentpart
      documentversion = lv_documentversion
      return          = ls_return.

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
    EXPORTING
      wait = 'X'.

Here the document is created successfully and document number, type, part, version is generated.
Just below this we have a get document BAPI

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_DOCUMENT_GETDETAIL2'
    EXPORTING
      documenttype    = lv_documenttype
      documentnumber  = lv_documentnumber
      documentpart    = lv_documentpart
      documentversion = lv_documentversion
    IMPORTING
      documentdata    = es_document_data
    TABLES
      documentfiles   = et_document_files.

This BAPI returns error that the document does't exist. Now I can understand if this happens in all scenarios but it is only happening in F-53 and specifically in the Posting of Open item screen.

System Message: 26/003

Any help is appreciated and thanks.

entry.title: Re: Item Master Data
entry.content: You can delete the items with the master data cleanup wizard and then reimport the items with the new Item code with DTW.

entry.title: Re: How to Set Up the Email Notification for Flexible Workflow in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
@Adhil the email templates for approval and rejection, that you've given as 

/***/02000029_COMPLETE_NEGATIV

/***/02000029_COMPLETE_POSITIV

There's an 'E' missing at the end of both. Flexible WF code has hard-coded checks for <WF_ID>_COMPLETE_POSITIVE and <WF_ID>_COMPLETE_NEGATIVE. So it won't work in your case.

entry.title: Incorrect Syntax near CardCode
entry.content:
Hi

 I am getting error Incorrect Syntax near CardCode

HanaCommand cmd = new HanaCommand("SELECT OCRD.'CardCode' FROM TestCompany.OCRD" , conn);

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAC - Disable global filter on charts
entry.content:
Hi @William_Yu 

I have a YEAR_MONTH column in my Calendar table. There are values like 202411, 202410. I added YEAR_MONTH_CALMONTH as MonthGranularity by adding Date Dimension from Modeler section.

Likewise, there is a column named VALID_FOR_MONTH in my Tariff table. By doing the same things, I added the VALID_FOR_MONTH_CALMONTH date dimension. I linked the two together in Story.

entry.title: Re: Filter process variants
entry.content:
Hello duyckme,

my name is Ascha and I am part of the virtual Customer Success Team at SAP Signavio.

I have double-checked with one of our experts on Variant Management and, unfortunately, filtering on specific variant dimensions/values is not possible at this moment. If you want me to forward this feature request to our Product Management team, please let me know.

Additionally, I would like to recommend our Roadmap Explorer in which you get information on planned updates and releases on our products of interest. In this way, you'll stay up-to-date.

For further questions, feel free to post them in our community or to reach out to signavio_success@sap.com

Thank you and kind regards

Ascha (as part of SAP Signavio Virtual Customer Success)

Note: AMDP and Table function usage needs to be avoided due to some reasons.

entry.title: Re: Error with javascript action in Process Governance
entry.content:
Hello Saif,

my name is Ascha and I am part of the virtual Customer Success team at SAP Signavio. Thanks for your request. Users can be allowed to add/edit Java Script tasks in the organization settings. 
It should protect organization agains unauthorized changes as JavaScript gives a lot of possibilities that may be misused. You might check with your Workspace Owner/Administrator if he/she can give the right to you, a user group or to everyone.

Please find here a relevant documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-governance/security-guide/script-task-modification-restriction?locale=en-US

Hope this helps. In case of further questions, feel free to post them in our community or to reach out to signavio_success@sap.com 

Thank you and kind regards

Ascha (as part of virtual Customer Success at SAP Signavio)

entry.title: Re: Quality notification and Internal order link

I also recommend to check this KBA about the document flow:
1652636 - Documents not displayed in document flow of Q notifications.

It can influence the display of standard documents.

Have a nice day,
Albert

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI MFA with Microsoft Entra (Part I): Integration with SAP Secure Login Service
entry.content:
Yes, SAP Cloud Identity's Identity Authentication Service can help with both of these things:

  • Configure the Subject Name Identifier Sent to the Application 
  • Convert Subject Name Identifier to Uppercase or Lowercase

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Build Apps
entry.content:

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-apps/service-guide/introduction-c2f99da6ff24490bbd0e705eb036ce84?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: What is the bank key best for Uganda, Botswana, Domin...
entry.content:
First you should look at attachments of note 1164216 - T005, T005S Content for those countries, noting the parameters related to bank like bank key length and rule (check also in your system with SM30 on view V_005_B)

Then check the web sites of organisations such as SWIFT or the central banks of those coyntries, and with any bank your work with to get list of banks (not always free of charge)

entry.title: Re: 261 Consumption in delivery based integration
entry.content: Were you able to resolve this issue ?

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration Error: HTTP header is larger than 8192 bytes.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

When processing a large payload in Cloud Integration with a S/4HANA Cloud target system using HTTP Adapter, I got the following error:

io.netty.handler.codec.TooLongFrameException: HTTP header is larger than 8192 bytes

 

I followed SAP Note 3146809(https://me.sap.com/notes/3146809/E) and tried the resolution(set "Cookie|x-csrf-token as Request Headers) , but the error still remained.

(P.s. I have also checked SAP Note 3537811 (https://me.sap.com/notes/3537811/E) but it does not really help because it merely asks me to reduce the size of HTTP header getting returned without letting me know how)

Does anyone know how to fix this?

===================================

As your reference, the following screenshots show the setting in my integration flow, which relate to http headers.

entry.title: Re: Alert Handlers not display in Control Tower
entry.content:
You can find this today in the Environment. 

Control Tower > Environments > Shared

entry.title: Re: Withholding tax percentage to change if the invoice a...
entry.content: Did you already read 3430452 - How Withholding Tax with Formula Works? (Extended withhold... (also generic 546564 - FAQ: Withholding tax )

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA direct connectivity with Event Mesh in Integration Suite
entry.content: @Sonalika I'm getting the same 500 error, after maintaining all the settings as described. How did you solve this error? Any pointers are highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration Error: HTTP header is larger than 8192 bytes.
entry.content:
Hello, 

I guess the HTTP Service you are consuming here is a Custom One, if yes then kindly check from the S4 ( Service Provider) side why this big response is getting passed back as response.  We had faced a similar issue where-in we had a custom Interface and lot many junk data was also getting passed back as response which resulted into same error. Later we just restricted the response precisely which would help in identifying the context and it fixed the problem. Please be informed that almost all Standard SAP shipped APIs would be created considering this thing and in most cases they should not result into such instances.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: Alert Handlers not display in Control Tower
entry.content:
Thank you so much Dinu, I've got it in Control Tower --> Environments --> Public

Regards,

entry.content: Could you please share the error message (if you're getting any)?

entry.title: Re: UPDATE INFO RECORD IN BULK BY CATEGORY WISE STANDARD AND SUBCONTRACT
entry.content: How is defined ZME11 in your system (custom development or transaction variant of ME11)

entry.title: How to trigger the workflow with condition sales organization 1000 and plant 1001?
entry.content:
Dear team,

How to trigger the workflow when Sales organization is "DIGITS" and Plant is "DIGITS" (in one condition)?

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to trigger the workflow with condition sales orga...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can try by setting sales organization as "1000" and plant as "1001" as the condition in the custom logic in BAdI "SD_APM_SET_APPROVAL_REASON". The workflow will be triggerred once these two conditions are met at the same time.

For details about how the exact logics should be written, please reach out to your local developer and consultant. They'll help on it according to the real business.

You can also refer to Blog - Flexible Workflow for Sales for Public Cloud - Complete Guide for all the details including some code examples.

Hope this helps!
Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: UPDATE INFO RECORD IN BULK BY CATEGORY WISE STANDARD...
entry.content: Did you already check Mass Changes to Purchasing Info Records in 'What's New in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408'

entry.title: Re: Scheduling Parameters in Maintenance Plan
entry.content:
Thanks for this excellent blog !

I have one question : do you know if it's possible to set a scheduling indicator by default, at maintenance plan creation ?

Many thanks in advance

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Preliminary versions of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you. A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

You can try the new Commenting Feature for What's New documentation in this release. See this blog for more information.

entry.title: Re: Enhancement for CK11N.
entry.content: With 'while CK11N execute' do you actually mean 'before any update from CK11N' ?

entry.title: Re: Camera functionality in SAPUI5
entry.content:
For those that see a white screen instead of a camera, there is a typo in the line:

"if (navigator.mdeiaDevices) {}".

Should be mediaDevices.

Thank you archisman92!

Best wishes,
Victor

entry.title: Questions about single and multi tenant BTP deployment
entry.content:
1)lets say I have one subaccount in a BTP global account.
I have 1 Cloud Foundry Runtime quota for it.
I deploy my app to it and its running and serving clients.

What do I do when if I want to create and test enhancements?
What is best practice when i have only one quota and thus can only deploy on one sub account?

2)Lets say I want to have multiple sub accounts so I can deploy a production version on one subaccount and another on a test subaccount to create and test new features. 
Do I need to buy 2 quota of Cloud Foundry Runtime for my global account and then add each to one sub account?

entry.title: Re: Focused Build Customer Extension Field Changes to Metadata Configuration and Process Type View,
entry.content: Hey, thanks again for your support. We opened a ticket, but for some reason, the field has been visible for a few days without any further (known) activity, so maybe it was related to some cache (even we have refreshed them active). But now it's working!

entry.title: When will be the Data type "Map" available in CAP Node.js ?
entry.content:
Hello,

In October 2024 release, I see new data type "Map" supported only for CAP Java https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/oct24#new-type-cds-map. Do we have any plans to support same for CAP Node.js ? 

We have requirement to store the data in JSON/document format in DB but our project is based on CAP Node.js.
Currently, I think only way to store such JSON data using HANA Document store and manually consume in CAP Node.js applications. Is my understanding correct?

Thanks,

Anil

SAP, Walldorf.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration Error: HTTP header is larger than 8192 bytes.
entry.content: Hello Sijin, Thank you for your answer. When you said Custom One, do you mean Non-SAP-Standard APIs? If yes, then we are actually using SAP Standard API (https://api.sap.com/api/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/resource)

entry.title: Re: the CDS view of Customer Down Payment Requests
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question. After talking to the experts, I can provide the following answer:

To retrieve customer down payment requests, you can utilize the following two views:

  • I_JournalEntry  

        Use this view to retrieve Accounting Document Header information.

  • I_OperationalAcctgDocItem  

        Use this view to retrive Accounting Document Item details within the entry view.

        To specifically identify customer down payment requests, use the field SpecialGLCode with the value F and the field AccountingDocumentCategory with the value S.

Hope this helps.

Best regards,

Anne

entry.title: Re: Enhancement for CK11N.
entry.content:
Which event/BAdIs did you already analyze (non-exhaustive list)

  • Enhancement Spot ES_SAPLCKDI
  • BAdIs DYNPRO_EXTENSION_CK, QUANTITY_STRUCT_CK, DATA_EXTENSION_CK

As there are no BAPI to update routing which solution did you already consider? 

  • 1644841 - Is there a BAPI to Update Routings?

entry.title: Re: Employee clocking in at 11:30PM for a midnight shift
entry.content: @btoombs: Thanks for the feedback - I will leave for early retirement end of year but we will ensure that monitoring and answering in this community will be continued. It is a good way of interaction with direct customer problems / requirements. Best regards, Volker

entry.title: Re: Publishing values to a recurring pay component from V...
entry.content: Hi, I tested this in a different environment. I added the code (with the recurring pay component) to the XML, but it didn’t appear in the UI, meaning you can’t adjust the date directly through the UI. However, after publishing, it successfully published to EC without errors. So, it is possible to publish a recurring pay component from Variable Pay to EC. It just won’t appear in the UI, and you’ll need to manage it through Provisioning (Effective Date & Event Reason).

entry.title: Re: FI Document Clearing
entry.content:
Dear all,

To meet my requirement, I have changed POSTING_INTERFACE_CLEARING and I have added the steps to select the retrieved items and activate them. 

So my real question is, since POSTING_INTERFACE_CLEARING is implementing Batch Input, so my guess is that at some point this is going to be obsolete, isn't any other FM or BAPI to do this without the use of batch input?  

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Navigation pane in SAC story
entry.content:
Hi Ivan, In 2024, There is a way to achieve this with the openNavigationPanel() function.

Table1.openNavigationPanel();

entry.title: Re: Focused Build Customer Extension Field Changes to Metadata Configuration and Process Type View,
entry.content:
Hi @Markus_Scheuber ,

It's great to hear that your issue is now resolved. It looks to me it was indeed a cache issue. Please close the ticket from your side as your issue is resolved.

Thanks,

Imran

entry.title: Re: We are coming to the end of the year, what preparation do we need to consider for Asset Accounti
entry.content: 2024 is coming to a close - time to prep for year end close.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Connector is not reachable from SAP Digital Man...
entry.content: It's impossible to say anything based on this information. We would at least need the log file from the Cloud Connector. But this cannot be dealt with in a community question: create a SAP support ticket for component BC-MID-SCC (SAP Cloud Connector) and attach the current SCC log file. Then this can be investigated by SAP support.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Development in multiple SAP versions
entry.content:
Hi
Did you found I solution for this?

entry.title: Re: We are coming to the end of the year, what preparation do we need to consider?
entry.content: The automatic balance carry forward starts from about middle of period 12, this will only be successful if you have close the prior year in Asset Accounting, if 2025 is the target year then only 2024 can be open for the balance carry forward to be completed successfully, therefore close 2023 in Make Company Code Settings app

entry.title: Re: Purchasing a discounted certification attempt
entry.content:
Hello  @David_Chaviano 
I'm Alaa
I've completed courses in SAP ABAP Cloud - Back-End Developer , and i want discount for attempts exam ( C_ABAPD_2309 )
Could please consider the my registration and make me eligible for free certification.

Hope, I am eagerly waiting for response.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Fun quick tip: Adding HTML code to your Message Definition and Alerts and reduce
entry.content:
Hi @StephanieBM01 

as far as I can tell, the new UI of does not support HTML in the warning, info and error message

 

can you confirm that this is the same on your end? We noticed that it broke some of the Links we were displaying in validation messages

 

Mic

entry.title: Re: working with Multiple salary templates
entry.content: Thank you so much for the confirmation. I regularly read your blogs, and they are consistently very helpful. I recall reading the blog you mentioned, but I can't seem to find it now.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One GL Account Determinations for Implementation Consultants
entry.content:
Hi team,

Any latest version avaiable related this PDF for INDIA, UK, USA Localizations? 

Thanks,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
@OlgaDolinskaja Hi Olga, we are doing a greenfield implementation with S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 FPS1. We are trying to follow the clean core strategy and decided that for now, we are fine with embedded steampunk, so doing the RAP development and Extensions on stack. We don't have very big developments which would make sense as a side-by-side scenario. Thus no BTP ABAP Environment. We also didn't jump on the SAP Build train, yet. 

As clean core is possible in all cases yet, we think it would be nice if the Cloud ATC and Custom Code Migration App were available without the need for the BTP ABAP Environment. Any opinion on that or recommendations for us?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – New options for managing Views for filters tables and charts
entry.content:
Hi Jack, Unfortunately that's currently not possible as the UI5FLEX_ENABLE_VARIANTS parameter is a server-wide setting.  You could certainly request it on the Customer Influence Portal at https://influence.sap.com 

Part of the reason for making it more controlled using Adapt UI, is that in several customers we have seen the number of public views become excessive, even with a small number of users creating the public views.  

Given the increasing role of key users, you might want to offer suggestions for making the key user role more streamlined.  For most customers that I see, key users are given access in the Development Environment - Unit Test client - and transport strategy adjusted to suit.

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
in the CDS with aggregation you should put LGORT. for now the system calculates sum by matnr and nothing more. despite the CDS1 is used in JOIN and in CDS2 it DOES NOT mean that the instances are the same. they are calculating independently.

So, the CDS2 should be like below. For clearness and openess - I have created ZMARD like MARD and fill it. you could check here. Maybe i am missing something - please inform.

 

define view ZMARD_CDS3_W as select from ZMARD_CDS1_M
{
    key matnr,
    key lgort,
    sum(labst) as stock
} group by matnr, lgort

entry.title: SAP Business AI : what does it cost?
entry.content:
In this article I want to discuss some aspects regarding the cost of embedded SAP Business AI that I think is especially important for SAP resellers / channel partners.

Pure cost is of course not the whole story and I will address three topics 1) cost, 2) business value and 3) “small letters”.

Lets look at a specific example:  Leveraging SAP Business AI to “write a case overview”.  I showed a demo of this functionality in this LinkedIn post.

 

Costs:  0.049 Euro.
This AI feature of “writing a case overview” is a premium embedded use case.  That means that the customer first needs to purchase SAP AI units before they can activate and start using the AI feature.  

When you do all the math, running the AI feature ONE time will cost 0.049 Euro. 

Background for calculation: in the cost estimator on the Discovery Center, we can look up that it costs 7 AI units (49 Euro) to run this specific AI use case 1000 times.  Thus, per use the cost is 0.049 Euro.

Value: ROI of 127551%
The value is obviously different per customer.  But it might be interesting to do a quick “back of the envelope” calculation.  Personally, I started my early career as a support consultant for an ERP vendor and often had to make summary of cases I worked on, reviewing all communication about a support tickets, customer licenses, product documentation etc.   I think it would have taken me at least 15 mins to put together a mail like shown in the demo.  Assuming a service agent costs 25 euro per hour, the savings are 6.25 Euro.   A pretty good ROI of 127551% !!!

Let’s extend the case:  If the service agent leverages the AI feature once a day (200 times in the year), the savings per year will be 1250 euro at a cost of 9.80 euro.  If the company has 20 agents doing the same, the cost would be 196 euro a year with a saving of 25.000 Euro. 

And there might be a lot of additional benefits, like processing customer cases faster, employee satisfaction, increased capacity of handle business growth without the need to recruit more people etc.

The small letters: really good news!
I think there are three important aspects for channel partners to understand:

Minimum purchase requirement:  The minimum purchase requirement for a customer is 100 SAP AI units, at an SAP list price of 700 euro (7 euro per unit).   Thus, for 700 euro a year, a customer can get going with embedded SAP business AI.    In the example above the company having 20 service agents using the “case summary” AI feature 200 times each a year will spend 28 SAP AI units for this.  The minimum they must purchase is 100 SAP AI units.  Thus, they will have 72 SAP AI units to run other SAP AI features. All of this for 700 euro per year.

Minimum usage requirements: In the example above, it might look like 1000 is the minimum usage requirement for this specific AI feature, but that is not what it means.  The 1000 is more a calculation example.  When we look at the SAP AI service list, we can see that there are “NONE” minimum usage requirements for this specific AI feature (see table below).  The same is true for the vast majority of SAP embedded AI scenarios.   Thus, if a customer wants to run the AI feature only one time, they can do this and have a lot of SAP AI units left to spend on other scenarios.  Also important to note that the AI units can be used across all the SAP solutions the customer runs, offering yet another level of flexibility.

SAP AI service list:

 

Expiration of SAP AI units: the entitlement / usage right of purchased AI units expires after one year.  So, it is important to plan properly and try to use all the credits before they expire.  They will automatically review for the next year.   It reminds me of the way it works with mobile service providers: you buy a bundle of Gb internet capacity and pay for it whether you use it or not.  The different is that these bundles typically expire every month while SAP AI units expire after one year.   If we really think about it, it is pretty similar for the SAP cloud user subscriptions: if a customer don't use them during the year, they too will "expire".   

Conclusion: very low hurdle for customers to get going.

In my opinion, the commercials around SAP embedded AI can work very well for SAP resellers focusing on midmarket: customers can get going for 700 euro a year with a lot of flexibility on how to use the purchased SAP AI units. 

In addition, the activation of SAP embedded AI feature is very simple.  It is mainly a user permission topic.  After all, the embedded AI features are “embedded” in the SAP solutions the customer is running.  That is why we talk about “activation “of embedded AI features, we do not talk about installation or configuration.    Note: It is another situation for Joule.  Joule runs separately (on SAP BTP).  For this reason, Joule does not fall under “embedded SAP business AI”.   Joule is a separate AI category itself.

Finally, for the end user it is very easy to start using embedded SAP AI features. The user runs a small wizard, the AI tool generates text and the user decide to accept the outcome or not.   Just watch the demo mentioned in the begin of this article to get a feeling for how it works.

entry.title: New Attribute in the What's New Viewer for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
In each version of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, we present a high number of changes and innovations in the What's New information. To help you prioritize the most important information and corresponding urgent tasks, we have introduced a new attribute called Action.

This new attribute is available as a column in the What's New Viewer, and as a filter option. It should help you to focus on the most important What’s New information by showing the urgency of the information. The attribute has the following values:

 

  • Critical – Immediate Action Required

This value is used for changes that might cause a day-1 impact in your system. This means that the change may lead to an unexpected change in user interfaces and system behavior after a release upgrade or an update. These changes require your immediate attention to avoid disruption to your business processes.

  • Action/Review Required

This value is for all changes that improve existing processes, but do not cause an immediate disruption while working with the affected functionality. It can also be information about a future change in functionality (including deprecations) that requires preparation by you.

  • Innovation

This value covers changes that enable a new functionality or process that is not immediately active in your system. You can decide whether to activate this innovation, or postpone its usage to a later point in time.

  • Information

This value is used for changes with minor impact.

 

The Action attribute is now visible in the Preliminary What's New for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502; you can find it on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502”). 

For more detailed information, see Changes to What's New Viewer.

entry.title: Extension ledgers in Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

We've a customer interersted in extention ledgers and planning to use if for tax adjustments. I've been searching for any limitations related to extension ledgers in public cloud but can't find any specific number. Does this means that there isn't any limitations in how many extension ledgers that can be created in public cloud? Or could anyone please assist with some links of where I can find it. 

Second question related to ledgers is the ability to add ledgers after the inital implementation. I'm avare of that the Group Valuation (Ledger 4G) needs to be activated from start and can't be activated later on. But what about extension ledgers, is it the same with extension ledgers that they needs to be added in the implementation or is it possible to add them later on if needed? 

Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC 10.0/10.1/12.0 – BRF+ Agent Rule determination based on users assigned to a role
entry.content:
Thanks, Madhu! Great blog.

I have a question: Should we follow a similar process when assigning a single role to a business role in BRM when we want to ensure that the single role owner approves the assignment as part of the workflow?

Additionally, when a risk is identified, do we need to create a custom risk agent to ensure the risk is properly approved before the BRM role status is marked as "Completed"?

entry.title: Re: #CoE#BUMA - Item price has not changed in the catalog...
entry.content: Hello @_JohnL_ Explorer. The error message you're encountering is likely due to a discrepancy between the price of the item in the external catalog and the price recorded in the Purchasing Info Record (PIR) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. When a source of supply is assigned, the system checks the PIR for the price, and if it doesn't match the catalog price, it throws an error.

entry.title: Re: #CoE#BUMA - Item price has not changed in the catalog...
entry.content:
Hello @_JohnL_ 

The error message you're encountering is likely due to a discrepancy between the price of the item in the external catalog and the price recorded in the Purchasing Info Record (PIR) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. When a source of supply is assigned, the system checks the PIR for the price, and if it doesn't match the catalog price, it throws an error.

To avoid this error, you have a few options:

1. Update the PIR to match the catalog price: This would ensure that the prices are consistent and prevent the error from occurring. However, this may not be feasible if the catalog prices change frequently or if there are many items to update.

2. Remove the source of supply: As you suggested, not assigning a source of supply would prevent the system from checking the PIR and thus avoid the error. However, this may not be ideal if the source of supply information is important for your procurement process.

3. Customize the BAdI: You could potentially customize the BAdI to ignore the price check when the item is being ordered from the external catalog. This would require some technical expertise and a good understanding of your business requirements to ensure that it doesn't cause other issues.

BR

Dave

entry.title: One Webi Scheduled report has been disappear
entry.content:
Dear Sir / Madam,

Recently, we faced a case that one monthly report scheduler disappeared.

May I know where (e.g. audit log) can find the root cause (e.g. delete by people) or due to some system cracks?

Thank you for your kind help.

entry.title: EWM integration with Carrier's APIs
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone has an experience with establishing a connection with carriers. Via APIs or any other solution? Is it possible directly or the middleware is neccesery?

it would be great If you could give mi any advice or steps to manage it.

Best regards

r.

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
maybe will be good if you put all fields and calculation on database side.

define view ZMARD_CDS4_W as select from ZMARD_CDS1_M
{
    key matnr,
    key werks,
    key lgort,
    sum(labst) as stock
} group by matnr, werks, lgort

 

and in report:

    SELECT matnr, stock
    FROM ZMARD_CDS4_W
    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @MT_tab_matnr
         WHERE matnr = @MT_tab_matnr-matnr
           AND werks = @MT_tab_matnr-werks
           AND lgort IN @s_lgort
    INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_stock).

entry.title: Vorstellung der SAP Academic Board DACH Arbeitsgruppe: "Lehrmethoden"
entry.content:
Sehr geehrte akademische Community in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz,

nach der Vorstellung der DACH Academic Board Arbeitsgruppe “Digitale Transformation und Management” richten wir den Fokus auf die Arbeitsgruppe “Lehrmethoden”, die von Birgit Lankes, Prof. Dr. Cordula Boden und Dr. Tim Neumann geleitet wird. In einem spannenden Interview haben wir die drei ExpertInnen zu ihrer Arbeit, Motivation und ihren Plänen befragt.

Viel Spass beim Lesen und gehen Sie gerne bei Nachfragen direkt auf die drei  AnsprechpartnerInnen zu.

André Biener (Director, SAP University Alliances)

****

André Biener (AB): “Hallo Birgit, Cordula und Tim. Könnt Ihr Euch bitte kurz vorstellen und erklären, worauf sich Eure  Arbeitsgruppe spezialisiert hat?”

Birgit Lankes (BL): “Ich komme von der Hochschule Niederrhein und unsere Arbeitsgruppe, der noch Cordula Boden von der FH Erfurt und Tim Neumann von der WH Zwickau angehören, konzentriert sich auf die Entwicklung von Curricula und Lernmethoden. Wir verfolgen dabei zwei Ansätze: Zum einen prüfen wir u. a. die von den UCCs bereitgestellten Unterlagen auf Qualität und Umsetzbarkeit, geben Feedback und testen diese mit Studierenden. Zum anderen suchen wir nach neuen didaktischen Konzepten, die wissenschaftlich fundiert sind, um sie in unsere Arbeit zu integrieren. Unser Ziel ist es, neue Lernerlebnisse zu schaffen und theoretische Konzepte auf ihre praktische Anwendbarkeit zu prüfen.”

Birgit Lankes

AB: “Eure Arbeitsgruppe beschäftigt sich intensiv mit der Entwicklung von Lehrmethoden. Was motiviert Euch persönlich an diesem Thema, und welche innovativen Ansätze möchtet ihr in Eure Lehre einbringen?”

BL: “Die Motivation ist einfach: Als Lehrende möchten wir neue Möglichkeiten schaffen, die das Lernen erleichtern und gleichzeitig Spaß machen. Wir alle wissen, dass das Lernen leichter fällt, wenn es Freude bereitet – das ist etwas, das wir aus eigener Erfahrung bestätigen können.”

Dr. Tim Neumann (TN): “Grundsätzlich unterstütze ich natürlich den Spaß an der Lehre und an der Wissensvermittlung. Ich würde das jedoch gerne erweitern - uns ist es wichtig Menschen, insbesondere Studierende, weiterzuentwickeln. Dabei ist es entscheidend, die Anforderungen aus der Praxis mit dem zu verknüpfen, was wir den Studierenden vermitteln. Das ist unsere wesentliche Motivation.”

AB: “In den letzten Jahren haben sich Lehrmethoden durch digitale Technologien stark gewandelt. Welche Prioritäten setzt Ihr in Eurer Forschung und Lehre, um diese Transformation zu gestalten?”

BL: “Unser Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Adaption der SAP-Systeme und Methoden, die im Kontext der Wirtschaftsinformatik nutzbar sind. Dies ist eine Herausforderung, da nicht alle Lehr- und Lernmethoden in allen Systemumgebungen funktionieren, weshalb wir besonders geeignete Konzepte suchen und umsetzen.”

TN: “Die grundlegenden Konzepte des Lehrens ändern sich nicht extrem, gerade in praxisorientierten Bereichen wie der SAP-Ausbildung. Dennoch stehen wir vor der Herausforderung, digitale Lehrmethoden wie asynchrones Lernen effektiv zu gestalten. Es geht darum, Selbststudium so zu ermöglichen, dass Studierende sich bspw. nicht nur passiv durch Videos klicken, sondern aktiv eingebunden werden. Hierfür ist die Auswahl der richtigen Werkzeuge und deren Schwierigkeit entscheidend.”

Dr. Tim Neumann

AB: “Nachhaltigkeit und ethische Aspekte gewinnen auch im Bildungsbereich zunehmend an Bedeutung. Wie integriert ihr diese Elemente in Euren Lehrmethoden?”

BL: “Nachhaltigkeit und ethische Aspekte sind immer Teil unserer Arbeit. Wir diskutieren diese Themen mit den Studierenden und arbeiten eng mit der Community sowie den UCCs zusammen, wie beispielsweise mit Stefan Weidner, der ein Nachhaltigkeitscurriculum entwickelt hat. Das Engagement der Community in diesem Bereich ist breit und unterstützt uns dabei, diese Aspekte voranzutreiben.”

TN: “Nachhaltigkeit verstehe ich in erster Linie als nachhaltige Wissensvermittlung. Das Wissen soll langfristig wirken. Im Kontext von Unternehmen spielen Projekte wie die Nachhaltigkeitsfallstudie von Stephan Weidner, die von Birgit erwähnt wurde, eine wichtige Rolle, um Standardlehrinhalte sinnvoll zu erweitern.”

AB: “Könnt Ihr Projekten oder Initiativen nennen, die Ihr erfolgreich an Euren Einrichtungen durchgeführt habt und die innovative Lehrmethoden nutzen?”

BL: “Ja, an unserer Hochschule haben wir bestehende Curricula im SAP S/4HANA-Bereich mit Podcasts unterstützt. Das Feedback der Studierenden war positiv, und wir planen, das Projekt auf der nächsten Academic-Konferenz in Berlin vorzustellen.”

Prof. Dr. Cordula Boden (CB): “Im Bachelor arbeiten wir eng mit den Fallstudien der UCCs, bei Problemen oder in den Herausforderungen versuchen wir aber gleichzeitig, Wege zu Problemlösungen aufzuzeigen, damit die Studierenden sich auch von den detaillierten Beschreibungen lösen und eigenständig Korrekturen und Buchungen durchführen können. D.h. wir geben Ihnen Tips, zeigen aber nicht den genauen Lösungsweg.

Im Master sollen sie sich noch weiter von fertigen Vorlagen lösen. Sie müssen eigene Geschäftsprozesse für die GBI definieren und prototypisch umsetzen und dokumentieren.”

TN: “Wir führen Weiterbildungsprogramme für Unternehmen durch und setzen reale SAP-Projekte mit Unternehmen um. Dabei geht es nicht nur um Lehren, sondern auch um praktisches Prozesswissen.”

AB: ‘’Was sind die größten Herausforderungen bei der Umsetzung neuer Lehrmethoden und wie geht ihr mit Hindernissen um?’’

BL: “Die größte Herausforderung besteht in den verschiedenen Gruppengrößen. Wir haben sowohl kleine Gruppen mit etwa 10 Studierenden als auch große Gruppen mit bis zu 100 Studierenden. Hier nutzen wir eine Kombination aus Offline- und Online-Angeboten sowie Gruppenarbeiten. Wichtig ist, dass wir aus unseren Fehlern lernen und das Beste daraus machen.”

CB: “Im Master starten die Studierenden mit sehr unterschiedlichen Voraussetzungen bezüglich SAP, dies gilt es auszugleichen, so dass alle teilnehmen können und trotzdem jeder gefordert wird.”

Prof. Dr. Cordula Boden

TN: “Die Vielzahl der verfügbaren Werkzeuge ist eine Herausforderung. Es erfordert ein Trial-and-Error-Verfahren, um passende Technologien zu identifizieren. Man, muss auch bereit sein, gescheiterte Ansätze zu verwerfen und zurück zu den bewährten Methoden zu gehen.”

AB: “Wie fördert Ihr Interaktivität und aktive Teilnahme der Studierenden in Euren Kursen, und welche Methoden haben sich dabei als besonders effektiv erwiesen?”

BL: “In meinen Kursen arbeite ich gerne mit Gruppenarbeiten, um den Austausch zu fördern. Es ist wichtig, dass Studierende Fragen stellen und interaktive Tools nutzen. Zum Beispiel stellen wir in Podcasts Aufgaben, die die Studierenden über interaktive Tools wie z.B. Tweedback bearbeiten. Die unmittelbar verfügbaren (anonymen) Antworten werden dann in den Kursen besprochen und analysiert.”

CB: “Bei uns haben sich Gruppenarbeiten in Zweier- oder Dreier Teams gut bewährt.”

TN: “Diskussionsrunden, Gruppenarbeiten und ein offener Austausch sind besonders effektiv. Im Präsenzunterricht gelingt dies deutlich besser als online. Jedoch hängt die Motivation der Studierenden auch von der Tageszeit und der Dauer der Lehrveranstaltung ab, was man bei der Kursgestaltung berücksichtigen sollte.”

AB: "Welche Rolle spielen Künstliche Intelligenz und maschinelles Lernen in Euren Lehrmethoden?”

BL: “Bisher haben KI und maschinelles Lernen eine untergeordnete Rolle gespielt. Ich habe mich mit RPA im Rahmen der BTP beschäftigt und motiviere meine Kolleginnen und Kollegen, es einzusetzen. Wir hoffen, dass wir zukünftig mehr KI-Ansätze in unsere Programme integrieren können.”

CB: “Im SAP Unterricht setze ich bisher keine KI ein.”

TN: “KI verändert, wie wir Wissen vermitteln und prüfen. Der Fokus wird sich mehr auf individuelles Coaching und Betreuung verlagern. Zudem können wir KI aktiv in der SAP-Ausbildung einsetzen, z. B. bei der Generierung von Stellenanzeigen im Personalwesen, um praktische Anwendungen aufzuzeigen.”

AB: “Habt Ihr bereits Pläne für zukünftige Projekte innerhalb Eurer Arbeitsgruppe?”

BL: “Ja, unsere Daueraufgabe ist die Qualitätssicherung und die Integration neuer Methoden. Neue Impulse kommen oft aus Konferenzen oder durch den Austausch mit Kolleginnen und Kollegen aus der Community. Ein Beispiel war ein Modul, das wir mit finnischen Partnern durchgeführt haben – eine Herausforderung wegen der unterschiedlichen Semesterzeiten, die wir aber gemeistert haben.”

TN: “Das Thema Integration wird weiterhin eine wichtige Rolle spielen, insbesondere durch kleinere Fallstudien. Darüber hinaus sind Themen wie Prozessautomatisierung und Prozess-Mining zentrale Aspekte, die wir zukünftig angehen wollen.”

AB: “Wie können sich KollegInnen aus der DACH-Region in Eure Arbeitsgruppe einbringen, und was plant ihr an Formaten?”

TN: “Man kann sich ganz einfach einbringen, indem man uns über verschiedene Kanäle anspricht oder anschreibt – sei es über LinkedIn, per E-Mail oder persönlich auf Konferenzen wie der Academic Community Konferenz, die nächstes Jahr in Berlin stattfindet.

Im Laufe des Jahres werden wir außerdem verschiedene Breakout-Sessions anbieten, die wir über die LinkedIn-Community bekannt geben. Über diese Sessions kann man uns ebenfalls kontaktieren und an unseren Themen teilhaben.”

BL: “Unser Ziel ist es, die Community und die Nutzung der Materialien der UCCs weiter voranzutreiben und Kolleginnen und Kollegen zu unterstützen. Jeder kann sich bei uns melden, sei es über unsere Sprecher Hans und Uta oder direkt bei Cordula, Tim oder mir.”

CB: “Ja, gerne bei uns melden, wer sich einbringen will.”

entry.title: Re: How to restrict employees from recording timesheet af...
entry.content: Hi @Volker_Ruof, we are also facing a similar issue during configuration of timesheet lock period, we didn't find quality information that address this issue. Can you please provide some insights on this, maybe any solution document that may be helpful?

entry.title: Re: Database Table getting updated after triggering an Idoc
entry.content:
ASSIGN ('(SAPLSZA0)XADRC') TO <xadrc>.
CHECK <xadrc> IS ASSIGNED.
MOVE-CORRESPONDING <xadrc> TO ls_adrc.

Raymond, this is the code I am using to populate the Idoc Segments. I am filling the Idoc segments from ls_adrc which is a structure. 

I did not get the point where you said <xadrc> is an internal table. Could you pleas explain ?

entry.title: Re: Work Center Migration : Capacities Interval Start Date (KAZY-DATUV) cannot be empty in staging
entry.content:
Hi gbrochet_2,

we are facing the same issue in the migration cockpit in an S4H public cloud 2408 environment for work centers. 

So far there is a manual workaround to cleans the data afterwards but not a solution for the migration. 

I hope someone from SAP will read and could give a more solid answer. 

Regards

entry.title: 360 report - change of colours?
entry.content:
Hi Comunity,

do you know if it is possible to change colours in the 360 report for participants in the graphs? Customer wants to change some of these colours, eg for Self, DR, All... I dint find that this is possible so I just want to ask here. I think that it is hard coded. Thanks a lot, Monika

@SachinPachauri do you know? Tanks a lot

entry.content:

Please share the course materials Handson for SAP Datasphere

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Leave Request App - Version - I
entry.content: Hi, I have the same problem, Did you solve this?

entry.title: Course Materials for Successfactors
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please provide the course materials for Successfcators

Thanks

entry.title: Hackathon @ DSAG Technologietage 2025
entry.content:
Die DSAG (Deutschsprachige SAP-Anwendergruppe) und die Public Cloud Group (PCG) laden Studierende zum Hackathon 2025 ein.

Dieser findet vom 30. März bis 2. April in Wiesbaden im Rahmen der DSAG Technologietage statt.

Mehr Informationen folgen hier in Kürze.

entry.title: Re: Employee Central Mass Data Management for Position
entry.content:
Hi, how can this feature be restricted in terms of Positions a user can update? e.g. if the user can only view positions for a specific geographical perimeter, could it be applied also to mass data mangement?

thanks!

entry.title: Re: Error "Failed to search Email"Failed to get Store"
entry.content: Hi Sankara, Thanks for the response.I attached the details  below ihere the email ID is hard coded,as I said this works fine when I test it directly on the process builder but fails when it is scheduled in the background using Triggers Do you think some authorization is missing to open outlook in background? Regards, Sathishkumar V

entry.title: Re: Rwdifferencemarcwlk1_enhanced job schedule
entry.content:
Hi,

RWDIFFERENCEMARCWLK1_ENHANCED program is not for creating listing conditions instead the program is used to create missing article segments (MARC) based on listing conditions. This program is supposed to be used incase the MARC extension did not happen during listing. This report should be used to handle exception scenarios. In your example, please investigate why Listing is failing in the first place, do not try to trigger listing process during STO creation.

entry.title: Re: Delta processing inside SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@Wanda_Soetomo 

but you can use graphical view above remote table.

due to the nature of the query in both cases you have a full table scan (no need for the first dataflow).

probably in case of remote table without replication is more efficient (network) to have a persistency (the query is a union of 3 subquery so we have 3 remote table scan).

a possibile solution could be:

- remote table

- view with persistency (more robust in case of failure than dataflow as it works with snapshots).

- view that implement CDC logic

- transformation flow.
